basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support - III Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Pharm with one year working experience in developing pharmaceutical formulations and analytical techniques like HPLC/LC-MS/MS.
qualification.details: Project Technical Support - III: M.Pharm with one year working experience in developing pharmaceutical formulations and analytical techniques like HPLC/LC-MS/MS.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - III Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support – III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the application form is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support – III post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is M.Pharm with one year of working experience in developing pharmaceutical formulations and analytical techniques like HPLC/LC-MS/MS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support – III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support – III post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Delhi, and a link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
